channel.title: U.S. Financial News, Markets, Banking and Business — Investment Banking
channel.description: Latest U.S. market news, banking updates, business insights, investigations, and real-time analysis to keep you informed on key financial developments

item.title: AI and Chip Stocks Lift Wall Street, S&P 500 Nears Record High
item.description:
U.S. stocks climbed as AI and semiconductor shares rebounded, sending the S&P 500 within about 1% of its record high amid renewed strength in technology sectors.

Key points:
• AI-related stocks and semiconductor companies drove Wall Street gains, pushing the S&P 500 closer to its all-time high.
• Chipmakers benefited from strong demand expectations for AI, data centres, and advanced computing technologies.
• Technology stocks regained momentum as investors focused on earnings growth and wider AI adoption.
• Market analysts are watching upcoming economic data and corporate earnings to determine whether the rally can continue.

Read the full article: AI and Chip Stocks Lift Wall Street, S&P 500 Nears Record High
